window_summary: This window tracks the recent typicode/json-server release stream from early alpha versions through the beta series, highlighting incremental feature additions, bug fixes, and API refinements.

chunks.title: v1.0.0-alpha.8
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: typicode/json-server
Release: v1.0.0-alpha.8
Tag: v1.0.0-alpha.8; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2023-12-30T01:40:21Z; created_at: 2023-12-30T00:57:27Z
Release notes:
- Fix remove unnecessary files
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the typicode/json-server release v1.0.0-alpha.8, the release note states that unnecessary files were removed.

chunks.title: v1.0.0-alpha.10
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: typicode/json-server
Release: v1.0.0-alpha.10
Tag: v1.0.0-alpha.10; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-01-05T01:16:48Z; created_at: 2024-01-05T01:11:15Z
Release notes:
- Support endpoints that return only an `object` (e.g. `/profile`, `/settings`, `/user`, ...)
Getting closer to making it the default when installing `json-server` :wink:
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the typicode/json-server release v1.0.0-alpha.10, the release note adds support for endpoints that return only an object, such as /profile, /settings, or /user, and mentions getting closer to making it the default when installing json-server.

chunks.title: v1.0.0-alpha.14
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: typicode/json-server
Release: v1.0.0-alpha.14
Tag: v1.0.0-alpha.14; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-01-09T02:12:42Z; created_at: 2024-01-09T02:08:52Z
Release notes:
- fix: don't fail if `--watch` is used
- fix: prevent `undefined` text
- chore: remove unused dependency
By the way, JSON Server now watches for file changes by default :rocket:
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the typicode/json-server release v1.0.0-alpha.14, the release note fixes a failure when --watch is used, prevents undefined text, removes an unused dependency, and announces that JSON Server now watches for file changes by default.

chunks.title: v1.0.0-beta.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: typicode/json-server
Release: v1.0.0-beta.0
Tag: v1.0.0-beta.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-05-13T13:29:13Z; created_at: 2024-05-13T13:24:02Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Switch from `alpha` to `beta`
* Fix: boolean filtering
* Fix: encoding issue in LICENSE by @JaN0h4ck in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1507
* Fix: add repository url field to package.json by @glensc in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1511
## New Contributors
* @JaN0h4ck made their first contribution in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1507
* @glensc made their first contribution in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1511
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/typicode/json-server/compare/v1.0.0-alpha.23...v1.0.0-beta.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the typicode/json-server release v1.0.0-beta.0, the release note switches from alpha to beta, fixes boolean filtering, fixes an encoding issue in LICENSE, and adds the repository url field to package.json.

chunks.title: v1.0.0-beta.4
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: typicode/json-server
Release: v1.0.0-beta.4
Tag: v1.0.0-beta.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-01-21T22:57:31Z; created_at: 2026-01-21T22:54:33Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* perf: replace Object.entries/fromEntries with Object.keys for better performance by @ssi02014 in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1639
* fix: handle undefined case in filtering logic by @manikanta5827 in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1650
* chore: use oxlint by @Copilot in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1670
* Drop Node.js 20 support and enforce erasable TypeScript syntax by @Copilot in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1671
* use TS natively and switch to pnpm by @typicode in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1672
* chore: update dev script by @typicode in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1675
* fix: patch bug by @typicode in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1676
* chore: Update outdated GitHub Actions version by @pgoslatara in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1677
* chore: update package.json version and publish script by @typicode in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1678
* chore: update publish.yml to include permissions by @typicode in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1679
* chore: remove NODE_AUTH_TOKEN from publish workflow by @typicode in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1680
* chore: update Node.js version to 24.x in publish workflow by @typicode in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1682
* chore: add tag flag for pnpm by @typicode in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1688
## New Contributors
* @ssi02014 made their first contribution in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1639
* @manikanta5827 made their first contribution in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1650
* @pgoslatara made their first contribution in https://github.com/typicode/json-server/pull/1677
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/typicode/json-server/compare/v1.0.0-beta.3...v1.0.0-beta.4
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the typicode/json-server release v1.0.0-beta.4, the release note includes performance improvements by replacing Object.entries/fromEntries with Object.keys, fixes undefined case in filtering logic, uses oxlint, drops Node.js 20 support, enforces erasable TypeScript syntax, uses TS natively and switches to pnpm, updates dev script, patches a bug, updates outdated GitHub Actions versions, updates package.json version and publish script, updates publish.yml to include permissions, removes NODE_AUTH_TOKEN from publish workflow, updates Node.js version to 24.x in publish workflow, and adds tag flag for pnpm.

questions.query_text: In the typicode/json-server releases, which release introduces the feature that autofixes missing id in arrays?

answer_support.answer_text: adds a new feature that autofixes missing id in arrays

questions.query_text: Across the typicode/json-server releases, how does the filtering capability change from v1.0.0-beta.2 to v1.0.0-beta.6?

options.text: v1.0.0-beta.2 allows multiple conditions for filtering, while v1.0.0-beta.6 adds _where filtering, uses a new operator separator, and drops _start, _end, and _limit.
v1.0.0-beta.2 introduces _where filtering, while v1.0.0-beta.6 removes all filtering capabilities.
Both releases only support single-condition filtering without any changes.
v1.0.0-beta.2 drops _start, _end, and _limit, while v1.0.0-beta.6 adds multiple conditions for filtering.

questions.expected_answer: v1.0.0-beta.2 allows multiple conditions for filtering, while v1.0.0-beta.6 adds _where filtering, uses a new operator separator, and drops _start, _end, and _limit.

answer_support.answer_text: adds _where filtering, uses a new operator separator, and drops _start, _end, and _limit

questions.query_text: In the typicode/json-server release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds support for endpoints returning only an object, (2) a release that switches from alpha to beta and fixes boolean filtering, (3) a release that adds JSON Schema support, (4) a release that returns JSON response for 404 errors instead of plain text.

answer_support.answer_text: adds support for endpoints that return only an object
switches from alpha to beta and fixes boolean filtering
returns JSON response for 404 errors instead of plain text
